name: funny-error-sounds
description: Plays hilarious sounds when your code has errors. Different sounds for 1, 3+, or 5+ errors!

funnyErrorSounds.enabled.description: Enable or disable funny error sounds.

funnyErrorSounds.debounceDelay.description: Milliseconds to wait after diagnostics change before playing a sound. Prevents spamming sounds while you type.

funnyErrorSounds.singleErrorSound.description:
Sound for 1–3 errors.
• Bundled (your sounds): bundled:faaa | bundled:henta_ahh | bundled:makabhosda_aag
• Generated: builtin:sadTrombone | builtin:dundunDun | builtin:alarm
• Custom file: absolute path to a .wav / .mp3 / .ogg file

funnyErrorSounds.multipleErrorsSound.description:
Sound for 4–5 errors.
• Bundled (your sounds): bundled:faaa | bundled:henta_ahh | bundled:makabhosda_aag
• Generated: builtin:sadTrombone | builtin:dundunDun | builtin:alarm
• Custom file: absolute path to a .wav / .mp3 / .ogg file

funnyErrorSounds.manyErrorsSound.description:
Sound for 6+ errors.
• Bundled (your sounds): bundled:faaa | bundled:henta_ahh | bundled:makabhosda_aag
• Generated: builtin:sadTrombone | builtin:dundunDun | builtin:alarm
• Custom file: absolute path to a .wav / .mp3 / .ogg file

funnyErrorSounds.onlyOnIncrease.description: Only play sounds when the error count increases (not when errors decrease or stay the same).

funnyErrorSounds.terminalErrorSound.description:
Sound to play when a terminal command exits with an error (non-zero exit code).
• Bundled: bundled:faaa | bundled:henta_ahh | bundled:makabhosda_aag
• Generated: builtin:sadTrombone | builtin:dundunDun | builtin:alarm
• Custom file: absolute path to a .wav / .mp3 / .ogg file
• Set to empty string "" to disable terminal sounds.

funnyErrorSounds.terminalErrorEnabled.description: Play a sound when any terminal command fails (exits with a non-zero code).
